concerns.text: FR-004 uses a placeholder '[deferred]' for the relative tolerance in criterion 3, making the inconsistency rule ambiguous and untestable. A concrete tolerance (e.g., 5 % of the larger count) must be specified.
FR-005 mentions a Wilson '[deferred]' confidence interval without stating the confidence level (e.g., 95 %). Without a defined level the CI cannot be verified.

SC-010 requires the dashboard to 'render without errors in a modern browser' but does not define an observable test procedure (e.g., headless‑browser screenshot comparison or console‑error check). The success criterion should specify a measurable verification method.
